Test Description: Verify no real credentials are committed in example files
Steps:
1. Open .env-example
2. Verify all values are placeholders (e.g. YOUR_KEY_HERE)
3. Run git log to check history for exposed keys
Expected Result: No real API keys, tokens, or credentials present in any committed file

Test Description: Verify MONTHLY_PLAN charges recur every 30 days, not one-time
Steps:
1. Subscribe to the monthly plan
2. Check Shopify billing API for interval type
3. Verify BillingInterval is Every30Days
4. Verify charge recurs on next billing cycle
Expected Result: Monthly plan uses BillingInterval.Every30Days and recurs cyclically

Test Description: Verify MR is linked to the correct Jira story
Steps:
1. Open PR description
2. Verify Jira ticket ID references the correct Shopify AI feature story
3. Open ticket and confirm scope matches PR changes
Expected Result: MR links to the correct feature ticket (not MCP tooling ticket).
